name: triage-feedback-server
description: Backend for the pediatric triage-feedback tool. Currently: the deterministic rule engine.

scripts.dev:admin: cross-env ADMIN_ENABLED=true ADMIN_USER=admin ADMIN_PASS=dev CORS_ORIGIN=http://127.0.0.1:5173 tsx watch src/server.ts
scripts.start:admin: cross-env NODE_ENV=production ADMIN_ENABLED=true ADMIN_USER=admin ADMIN_PASS=dev ADMIN_UI_GATE=true WEB_ROOT=../web/dist tsx src/server.ts
scripts.start:dual: cross-env NODE_ENV=production ADMIN_ENABLED=true ADMIN_USER=admin ADMIN_PASS=dev ADMIN_UI_GATE=true WEB_ROOT=../web/dist CORS_ORIGIN=http://127.0.0.1:5173 tsx src/server.ts
